conditions: Random assignment, successful manipulation, calibrated measurements, and masked validation
observable: Ordering of synthetic intermediate M and outcome Y
expected_if_focal: Intermediate M changes before outcome Y in condition X
expected_if_rivals: H2 predicts no condition-specific intermediate change and a shift shared with the reference quantity
falsifier: Outcome Y changes without the prespecified intermediate change after successful manipulation and valid measurement
indeterminate_result: Manipulation or measurement check fails, or uncertainty is too large to distinguish the patterns
boundary_conditions: Synthetic eligible units over one prespecified interval
uncertainty: Magnitude is not assumed; the planned interval and measurement resolution determine whether patterns are distinguishable

conditions: Matched synthetic acquisition and calibration workflow
observable: Shift in the synthetic negative-control reference quantity
expected_if_focal: Reference quantity and outcome Y shift together by acquisition period
expected_if_rivals: H1 predicts outcome Y changes without a corresponding reference shift
falsifier: Reference quantity is stable across independently calibrated periods while outcome Y changes reproducibly by assignment
indeterminate_result: Reference measurement fails or acquisition periods do not overlap assigned conditions
boundary_conditions: Synthetic acquisition batches covered by the declared calibration process
uncertainty: A control shift can have causes other than the stated measurement-drift rival
